title: Writing Integration Tests Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on writing integration test cases.

questions.question: Regarding the testing of software, what is an 'Integration Test' used for?
options: To collect and analyze data from the database
To verify that different components of your software work together correctly, such as between your API and database

questions.question: Which of these is a key step in a integration-testing-based workflow for a web application project?
options: Testing the interactions between your API and database directly within a test run
Recording a commit directly to the SQL server
Its only possible for SQL repositories
